--- apache-solr-4.8.1.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN /usr/ports/textproc/apache-solr/Makefile ./Makefile
--- /usr/ports/textproc/apache-solr/Makefile    2014-01-25 20:32:36.821226822 -0600
+++ ./Makefile  2014-05-31 02:52:44.655165312 -0500
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/textproc/apache-solr/Makefile 341120 2014-01-25 22:03:15Z mat $

 PORTNAME=      apache-solr
-PORTVERSION=   4.6.0
+PORTVERSION=   4.8.1
 CATEGORIES=    textproc java
 MASTER_SITES=  APACHE
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    lucene/solr/${PORTVERSION}
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@

 USES=  shebangfix
 SHEBANG_FILES= example/etc/create-solrtest.keystore.sh
-JAVA_VERSION=  1.6+
+JAVA_VERSION=  1.7+
 NO_BUILD=      yes
 PLIST_SUB+=    PORTVERSION="${PORTVERSION}"
 USE_JAVA=      yes
diff -ruN /usr/ports/textproc/apache-solr/distinfo ./distinfo
--- /usr/ports/textproc/apache-solr/distinfo    2013-11-25 09:55:15.074565586 -0600
